title: Trip Support Flights - Flight Search Engine
description: Advanced flight search and booking engine integration. Learn how we built a high-performance flight search system processing millions of flight options.

content.overview: Trip Support is a major player in the travel industry. This project focused on enhancing their flight booking capabilities by integrating multiple Global Distribution System (GDS) and Low-Cost Carrier (LCC) providers into a unified, high-performance search engine.
content.challenge: Integrating diverse flight data sources while maintaining fast search speeds and accurate pricing presented significant technical challenges. The system needed to handle complex filtering, multi-city itineraries, and provide consistent results across all providers.
content.solution: We implemented a microservices architecture to handle various API integrations efficiently. Optimized search algorithms and intelligent caching reduced response times, while a user-friendly interface simplifies the flight selection process for travelers.
content.results: The enhanced flight engine led to a 30% increase in conversion rates. Users now have access to a much wider range of flight options and competitive pricing, significantly improving the overall booking experience.

seo_title: Trip Support Flights Case Study | Momentaj - Flight Search Engine Development
seo_description: Discover how Momentaj built Trip Support's flight search engine. Learn about the technical challenges of integrating multiple flight providers.
seo_keywords: flight search engine, GDS integration, travel API, Amadeus, flight booking, travel technology
